_about: Curated World Gold Council / PBoC overlay for central-bank gold holdings (metric tonnes). Used ONLY to extend the most-recent months where IMF IFS lags. IMF IFS is the backbone for all history; this file overlays fresher reported values on top. Limited extracts used under fair-industry-practice with citation; do not mirror the full WGC dataset here.
_refresh: Monthly, ~2nd week. China: take PBoC's monthly headline in million fine troy oz and divide by 32.1507 to get tonnes. Others: only add a country here if WGC is materially fresher than IMF IFS for it.
